final:
// // This comparator outputs 1 when the first input is greater than or equal to the second input
module binary_less_than_comparator (
    input [3:0] a,
    input [3:0] b,
    output reg lt);always @(*) begin
        lt = (a < b);
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This comparator outputs 1 when the first input is greater than or equal to the second input
